message:
chore(beads): close wa-nu4.3.9.22 + file blocker .29

- wa-nu4.3.9.22 closed: CI evidence collection complete.
  100/100 last main runs not green (97 cancelled, 1 failure
  24973856126 at e549b5e2, 0 success). Workflow_dispatch attempt
  25033837579 (headSha 11e22da0) cancelled within 30s by next
  swarm push.
- wa-nu4.3.9.29 filed: structural blocker — concurrency
  cancel-in-progress + heavy swarm push rate prevents any CI run
  on main from completing. Suggested fix: ci.yml concurrency
  group keyed on github.event_name OR github.sha.
- Evidence comment added to wa-nu4.3.9 epic (left OPEN).
